'''Led Daragon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="DaG" /> member of the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Coruscant">{{CSWECite|I|146-147|Coruscant}}</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] elite society during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a conflict that lasted between [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="Clone">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates {{Film|II}}, which includes the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and dates {{Film|III}}, which includes the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the Clone Wars, to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> He was a frequenter of the [[Galaxies Opera House/Legends|Galaxies Opera House]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of Coruscant.<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|acros_krik|Acros-Krik}}</ref>  

In 19 BBY,<ref name="BBY">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates {{Film|III}} to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Daragon was present at a performance of [[Squid Lake/Legends|''Squid Lake'']] following the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], which [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] also attended.<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref>
